AD_VAL_RULE.NAME: SSFC_CostCenterId
AD_VAL_RULE.CODE: CASE WHEN @IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' THEN (SELECT CASE WHEN em_ssfc_costcenter_id IS NOT NULL THEN (C_Costcenter.C_Costcenter_ID IN (SELECT dt.em_ssfc_costcenter_id FROM c_doctype dt WHERE dt.c_doctype_id = @C_DocTypeTarget_ID@)) WHEN (SELECT ss.EM_Ssopos_C_Costcenter_ID FROM AD_Org ss WHERE ss.AD_Org_ID = @AD_Org_ID@) IS NOT NULL THEN (C_Costcenter.C_Costcenter_ID IN (SELECT ss.EM_Ssopos_C_Costcenter_ID FROM AD_Org ss WHERE ss.AD_Org_ID = @AD_Org_ID@)) ELSE (C_Costcenter.C_Costcenter_ID IN (SELECT C_Costcenter_ID FROM C_Costcenter)) END FROM c_doctype WHERE c_doctype_id = @C_DocTypeTarget_ID@) ELSE (C_Costcenter.C_Costcenter_ID IN (SELECT C_Costcenter_ID FROM C_Costcenter)) END

AD_VAL_RULE.NAME: C_Costcenter_ByOrg
AD_VAL_RULE.CODE: EXISTS (SELECT 1 from AD_Org where AD_Org.AD_Org_ID = @AD_Org_ID@ and AD_Org.EM_Spev_C_Costcenter_ID = C_Costcenter.C_Costcenter_ID)

AD_VAL_RULE.NAME: SSFC_CostCenterAB
AD_VAL_RULE.CODE: CASE WHEN @IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' THEN (SELECT CASE WHEN em_ssfc_costcenter_id IS NOT NULL THEN (C_Costcenter.C_Costcenter_ID IN (SELECT dt.em_ssfc_costcenter_id FROM c_doctype dt WHERE dt.c_doctype_id = @C_DocType_ID@)) WHEN (SELECT ss.EM_Ssopos_C_Costcenter_ID FROM AD_Org ss WHERE ss.AD_Org_ID = @AD_Org_ID@) IS NOT NULL THEN (C_Costcenter.C_Costcenter_ID IN (SELECT ss.EM_Ssopos_C_Costcenter_ID FROM AD_Org ss WHERE ss.AD_Org_ID = @AD_Org_ID@)) ELSE (C_Costcenter.C_Costcenter_ID IN (SELECT C_Costcenter_ID FROM C_Costcenter)) END FROM c_doctype WHERE c_doctype_id = @C_DocType_ID@) ELSE (C_Costcenter.C_Costcenter_ID IN (SELECT C_Costcenter_ID FROM C_Costcenter)) END

AD_VAL_RULE.NAME: SSFC_DimensionBP
AD_VAL_RULE.CODE: CASE WHEN @IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' THEN (User1.User1_ID IN (SELECT bp.em_ssfc_user1_id FROM C_BPartner bp WHERE bp.C_BPartner_ID = @C_BPartner_ID@)) ELSE (User1.User1_ID IN (SELECT User1_ID FROM User1)) END
